headline: Head of Marketing at Wildstone
summary: Chartered Marketer with 15 years of experience. Marketing generalist, highly analytical…

experiences.title: Head Of Marketing
experiences.description: Creation and implementation of company marketing strategy across all channels Development and implementation of multi-channel advertising campaigns to increase both brand awareness and lead generation in UK, the Netherlands, Spain, Ireland and Germany Production of various marketing materials with graphic designers Managing website improvements with web developers Briefing video production suppliers to create required company videos Liaising with Development and Acquisition teams to create relevant marketing collateral Maximising PR opportunities and increasing press coverage Managing the production of company’s annual portfolio book Management and direct execution of multiple special projects Management and development of the marketing team Budget planning and management Quarterly KPI reporting and analysis of ROI

experiences.title: Head Of Marketing
experiences.description: Development of an overall Marketing Strategy and budget. Development of the Digital Marketing plan and social media tactics. Managing the brand image and marketing communications. 40% growth in lead generation year on year. Successfully orchestrated a company rebrand, from brand audit to execution - NPS increased by 43 points as a result. Built a new company website from scratch alongside a Graphic Designer. SEO management. Setup and management of Google Ads and Bing Ads. Regular email marketing. Created lead generating automated email journeys based on customer segmentation and engagement. Evaluating marketing campaigns, channels and ROI. Print and online advertising. Negotiating and securing relevant sponsorship deals. Conducting brand audits and client surveys. Managing the production of on-brand marketing materials. Experience working with developers as a product owner of the company’s mobile app from Discovery to Testing. Graphic design - Adobe Illustrator and Adobe InDesign proficient. Supporting the Sales Team with client proposals and presentations. Successfully implemented various channel integrations e.g. Wordpress + Pipedrive + Google Analytics + Campaign Monitor for accurate ROI evaluation as well as email database growth and customer segmentation. Board-level reporting. Project manager for deployment of various innovations into the business (new software and processes) as well as training the internal team.
